activities.name: Short recovery run
activities.description: Felt pretty good

activities.name: Car chase from Bellevue ends in our rock wall
activities.description: Armed robbery suspect, apprehended right in front of our garage. Exciting morning. Then Bean and I went for a jog around the lake

activities.name: Fun tour de Bridle Trails with Expect Delays and friends
activities.description: Probably about 1/2 a mile short due to not starting the watch

activities.name: Windy afternoon in the disco with Chris and Bean
Fast shoes or generous GPS?
activities.description: Not sure how, but I went about a minute faster on this course than recent usual

activities.name: Long and flat with Herve
activities.description: Not as easy as the last long run we did, but glad to get it done.

activities.name: Sweet run with Grace
activities.description: Great trails and smooth asphalt with Grace, then soaking rain and dodgy trails on my return. Very fun.

activities.name: Rock Creek trail loop to Maryland with Grace
Beara Peninsula walk
activities.description: First day on the trails with our Stanford travel/study group. Bus ride to the trail, RIB boat back to Kenmare where we are staying. Glorious wild country.

activities.name: Kerry Way towards Killarney
activities.description: Glaciated uplands, peat bogs, and Oak forests. Wonderful walk except for the midges at lunch.

activities.name: Walk / Boat / Walk in the Killarney National Park
Looking for trails and not finding them
activities.description: With Martha, who taught me about Linden trees. Thank you!

activities.name: Walk around the end of the Dingle Peninsula
activities.description: To a picnic lunch above a beach. Preceded by a sheep dog demo. Very impressive!

activities.name: Woods of Ross Castle with Martha
activities.description: Beautiful sunny morning. Took a taxi there, and attempted to get one back, but no go. So… Shanks’ pony!

activities.name: Cliffs of Moher on a rare bluebird day
On the Karst limestone of the Burren
Up Corkscrew hill in the fog with Martha
Exploring the stone island of Inisheer
activities.description: Closest of the Aran Islands. The stone walls were built densely to clear the fields of stone ahead of making their own soil with tons of seaweed per acre. Tough life!

activities.name: Intervals x4
activities.description: Martha’s idea. With a warm-up and warm-down

activities.name: Final Walk of our Ireland trip: Black Head traverse
activities.description: Big sky and brooding clouds over beautiful Galway Bay

activities.name: Chris runs again!
activities.description: Before we get on a flight back to DC

activities.name: Leg stretcher in Rock Creek Park
activities.description: Hadn’t seen the zoo loop part of the trail before. Very beautiful. Hot (for me) and humid, so a few stops and high heart rate

activities.name: Delicate flower wilts in the humidity
activities.description: But it was still a beautiful run. And check out the last photo taken from a bridge across Rock Creek.

activities.name: Amazing Chicago
activities.description: On a crisp spring morning. What a delight.

activities.name: Tangling with Bean
activities.description: It’s good to be home.

activities.name: T minus 2 days
activities.description:
This is the course runners will use on Saturday. *Almost* identical to last year, and quite different from year one.

If you aren’t participating please stop by during the day at the start/finish and say hello. I will be there from 9am until after dark (at least)
